## Work Problem

Who has this problem, and what output are they trying to create?

## Inputs

What source material would the reader give Codex?

## Expected Output

What should Codex produce?

## Human Review

What must a human check before using the output?

## Source Basis

Link official docs, public examples, or other sources that support this workflow:
